description: Dogelon Mars (ELON) emerged in 2021 on Ethereum as a space-themed memecoin inspired by Elon Musk and interplanetary storytelling. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 ELON gives original ELON holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, full AI contract capability, turning ELON into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Dogelon Mars
